headline: A Look At Zoom Communications (ZM) Valuation After The Launch Of ZoomMate AI Work Surface
summary: Zoom Communications (ZM) is back in focus after launching ZoomMate, an AI work surface that ties meeting conversations directly into search, workflows, and content creation across tools like Salesforce, ServiceNow, and Workday. See our latest analysis for Zoom Communications. That launch comes after a sharp swing in sentiment, with the stock up 35.75% on a 90 day share price return and a 1 year total shareholder return of 29.36%, signalling building momentum despite a weaker 5 year total...

headline: Salesforce to Transform Fan Engagement and Tournament Operations at FIFA World Cup 2026™ and FIFA Women’s World Cup 2027™

headline: Tech Stocks Fall. Why Broadcom, Google, AI IPOs May Have Triggered Sell-Off.

headline: Oracle Stock Has Returned $54 Billion To Shareholders. Can It Continue?
summary: In the last five years, Oracle (ORCL) stock has returned a notable $54 Bil back to its shareholders through cold, hard cash via dividends and buybacks. That is not a small feat for a company that has simultaneously been funding one of the more aggressive infrastructure build-outs in enterprise tech. Let's look at some numbers and compare how this payout power stacks up against the market's biggest capital-return machines.
